title: Smooth Vanilla
description: The smoothest vanilla experience with new smooth animations like your hand and mobs!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e96834a3dae3aae97e17633ba2154329d4752ea1.jpeg)

**This unique modpack features a lot of smooth animations and small additions to the vanilla experience of the game. It is also kind of supposed to be like Actions and Stuff. So it is not only new animations but also things like Sounds, Performance and Backpacks.** 

I first made this modpack because I really like Minecraft this way and I upload it so people that also like a Modpack like this also can play it!

## Performance
There are a TON of performance mods in here. Also there is a light weight shader if you struggle with performance!

## Animations
I added a couple Animations like holding items are being shown with "Hold My Items". Almost all of the mobs have new animations thanks to "Fresh Animations". Also the scrolling feels super smooth thanks to "Smooth Scrolling"

## Additions
I also added few additions like a new Nether and a new End. There are also backpacks for when your inventory gets full. There are also Mods to help with the anvil and the enchanting table with making them easier. Also included is the Physics Mod but it is barely used... 

## Textures
There is also a resource pack loaded which is named "Whimscape". I really like the look of it you can ofcourse turn it off.

## Shaders
Also enabled is a Shaderpack called "Complementary Shaders - Unbound". But theres also two other and one of them is for performance if you have trouble.

AND MORE!

Here are some images from ingame:
![Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d37521ad3cb1b392b2d1f21a3f56901c51405fd7.jpeg)

![Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae931ec216e8329e24b2943721d49fd36ac5ed54.jpeg)

![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3453b8b166cf3a62c423f51bbbbac3dba883b0a2.jpeg)
